overview: Dormant Account Reactivation Portal for BAWJIASE COMMUNITY BANK PLC — a full-stack banking web app for managing dormant account reactivation workflows. Customers can browse the publication list, verify their accounts, submit phone follow-ups, and upload Ghana Card documents for online reactivation. Staff can securely review submissions, manage follow-ups, export printable reactivation forms, and track activated accounts.
features: Publication list with searchable dormant accounts
Two-step account verification and phone follow-up for customers
Online reactivation form with 3 Ghana Card image uploads
Staff dashboard with Internet Identity login
Staff management of follow-ups, reactivations, and activated accounts
Printable reactivation form with bank branding
Responsive banking UI with toasts and confirmation dialogs
